tuning: E A D G B E
content:
[Intro]
[ch]C[/ch] [ch]G#[/ch] [ch]Bmaj7[/ch] [ch]G[/ch]
[ch]C[/ch] [ch]G#[/ch] [ch]Bmaj7[/ch] [ch]G[/ch]
[ch]C[/ch] [ch]G#[/ch] [ch]Bmaj7[/ch] [ch]G[/ch]

[Chorus]
[tab]  [ch]C[/ch]                   [ch]G#[/ch]                         [ch]Bmaj7[/ch]
I wish I was a little bit taller, I wish I was a baller[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]G[/ch]
I wish I had a girl who looked good, I would[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]                  [ch]G#[/ch]                           [ch]Bmaj7[/ch]
call her, I wish I had a rabbit in a hat with a bat[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]G[/ch]
And a six-four Impala[/tab]

[tab]  [ch]C[/ch]                   [ch]G#[/ch]                         [ch]Bmaj7[/ch]
I wish I was a little bit taller, I wish I was a baller[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]G[/ch]
I wish I had a girl who looked good, I would[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]                  [ch]G#[/ch]                           [ch]Bmaj7[/ch]
call her, I wish I had a rabbit in a hat with a bat[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]G[/ch]
And a six-four Impala[/tab]


[Verse 1]
[tab]  [ch]C[/ch]                   [ch]G#[/ch]                             [ch]Bmaj7[/ch]
I wish I was like six-foot-nine, So I can get with Leoshi[/tab]
[tab]                 [ch]G[/ch]
'Cause she don't know me, But yo she's really fine[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]                     [ch]G#[/ch]
   You know I see her all the time, Everywhere I go[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]Bmaj7[/ch]              [ch]G[/ch]
And even in my dreams, I can scheme of ways to make her mine[/tab]

[tab][ch]C[/ch]                     [ch]G#[/ch]
  'Cause I know she's livin' phat[/tab]
[tab]                   [ch]Bmaj7[/ch]            [ch]G[/ch]
Her boyfriend's tall and he plays ball, So how am I gonna compete with that?[/tab]

[tab][ch]C[/ch]                         [ch]G#[/ch]
  'Cause when it comes to playing basketball[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]Bmaj7[/ch]              [ch]G[/ch]
I'm always last to be picked, And in some cases never picked at all[/tab]

[tab][ch]C[/ch]                   [ch]G#[/ch]
  So I just lean up on the wall[/tab]
[tab]                 [ch]Bmaj7[/ch]                          [ch]G[/ch]
Or sit up in the bleachers with the rest of the girls, Who came to watch their man ball[/tab]

[tab][ch]C[/ch]               [ch]G#[/ch]
  Dag, y'all! I never understood, black[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]Bmaj7[/ch]            [ch]G[/ch]
Why the jocks get the fly girls, And me, I get the hood rats[/tab]

[tab][ch]C[/ch]                   [ch]G#[/ch]
  I tell 'em, "Scat,  skittle, sca-bobble"[/tab]
[tab]               [ch]Bmaj7[/ch]                [ch]G[/ch]
Got hit with a bottle, And put in a hospital for talkin' that mess[/tab]

[tab][ch]C[/ch]           [ch]G#[/ch]
  I confess it's a shame[/tab]
[tab]                     [ch]Bmaj7[/ch]                [ch]G[/ch]
When you livin' in a city that's the size of a box, And nobody knows yo' name[/tab]

[tab][ch]C[/ch]       [ch]G#[/ch]
  Glad I came, to my senses[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]Bmaj7[/ch]                     [ch]G[/ch]
Like quick-quick, got sick-sick to my stomach[/tab]
[tab]              [ch]C[/ch]                   [ch]G#[/ch]
Overcometh by thoughts, Of me and her together, right?[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]Bmaj7[/ch]                     [ch]G[/ch]
So when I asked her out, she said I wasn't her type[/tab]


[Chorus]
[tab]  [ch]C[/ch]                   [ch]G#[/ch]                         [ch]Bmaj7[/ch]
I wish I was a little bit taller, I wish I was a baller[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]G[/ch]
I wish I had a girl who looked good, I would[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]                  [ch]G#[/ch]                           [ch]Bmaj7[/ch]
call her, I wish I had a rabbit in a hat with a bat[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]G[/ch]
And a six-four Impala[/tab]

[tab]  [ch]C[/ch]                   [ch]G#[/ch]                         [ch]Bmaj7[/ch]
I wish I was a little bit taller, I wish I was a baller[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]G[/ch]
I wish I had a girl who looked good, I would[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]                  [ch]G#[/ch]                           [ch]Bmaj7[/ch]
call her, I wish I had a rabbit in a hat with a bat[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]G[/ch]
And a six-four Impala[/tab]


[Verse 2]
[tab]  [ch]C[/ch]                  [ch]G#[/ch]                         [ch]Bmaj7[/ch]
I wish I had a brand new car so far, I got this hatchback[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]G[/ch]
And everywhere I go, yo, I gets laughed at[/tab]

[tab][ch]C[/ch]                    [ch]G#[/ch]
  And when I'm in my car I'm laid back[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]Bmaj7[/ch]                   [ch]G[/ch]
I got an 8-track, and a spare tire in the backseat, but that's flat[/tab]

[tab][ch]C[/ch]                     [ch]G#[/ch]
  And do you wanna know what's really wack?[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]Bmaj7[/ch]                  [ch]G[/ch]
See, I can't even get a date, so what do you think of that?[/tab]

[tab]             [ch]C[/ch]                   [ch]G#[/ch]
I heard that prom night is a bomb  night, With a hood rat you can hold tight[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]Bmaj7[/ch]                     [ch]G[/ch]
But really though, I'm Figaro,  When in my car I can't even get a hello[/tab]

[tab][ch]C[/ch]          [ch]G#[/ch]                           [ch]Bmaj7[/ch]
  Well, so many people wanna cruise Crenshaw on Sunday[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]G[/ch]
One day I'ma have to get in my car and go[/tab]

[tab][ch]C[/ch]                     [ch]G#[/ch]
  You know I take the 110 until the 105[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bmaj7[/ch]            [ch]G[/ch]
  Get off at Crenshaw, tell my homies, "Look alive!"[/tab]

[tab][ch]C[/ch]                  [ch]G#[/ch]
  'Cause it's hard to survive[/tab]
[tab]                        [ch]Bmaj7[/ch]            [ch]G[/ch]
When you're living in a concrete jungle, And these girls keep Passin' Me By[/tab]

[tab][ch]C[/ch]     [ch]G#[/ch]                   [ch]Bmaj7[/ch]
  She looks fly, she looks fly[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]G[/ch]
Make me say, "my, my, my"[/tab]

[Chorus]
[tab]  [ch]C[/ch]                   [ch]G#[/ch]                         [ch]Bmaj7[/ch]
I wish I was a little bit taller, I wish I was a baller[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]G[/ch]
I wish I had a girl who looked good, I would[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]                  [ch]G#[/ch]                           [ch]Bmaj7[/ch]
call her, I wish I had a rabbit in a hat with a bat[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]G[/ch]
And a six-four Impala[/tab]

[tab]  [ch]C[/ch]                   [ch]G#[/ch]                         [ch]Bmaj7[/ch]
I wish I was a little bit taller, I wish I was a baller[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]G[/ch]
I wish I had a girl who looked good, I would[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]                  [ch]G#[/ch]                           [ch]Bmaj7[/ch]
call her, I wish I had a rabbit in a hat with a bat[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]G[/ch]
And a six-four Impala[/tab]

[Verse 3]
[tab]    [ch]C[/ch]               [ch]G#[/ch]
Heeey, I wish I had my way[/tab]
[tab]                            [ch]Bmaj7[/ch]                 [ch]G[/ch]
'Cause every day would be a Friday, And you could even speed on the highway[/tab]

[tab][ch]C[/ch]              [ch]G#[/ch]
  I would play ghetto games[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]Bmaj7[/ch]           [ch]G[/ch]
Name my kids ghetto names, Little Mookie, Big Al, Lorraine[/tab]

[tab][ch]C[/ch]                     [ch]G#[/ch]
  Yo, you know that's on the real[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]Bmaj7[/ch]                   [ch]G[/ch]
So if you're down on your luck, Then you should know just how I feel[/tab]

[tab][ch]C[/ch]                          [ch]G#[/ch]
  'Cause if you don't want me around[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]Bmaj7[/ch]              [ch]G[/ch]
See, I go simple, I go easy, I go Greyhound[/tab]

[tab][ch]C[/ch]         [ch]G#[/ch]
Hey, you,    what's that sound?[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bmaj7[/ch]          [ch]G[/ch]
Everybody look what's goin' down[/tab]

[tab][ch]C[/ch]        [ch]G#[/ch]
Ah, yes,    ain't that fresh?[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bmaj7[/ch]              [ch]G[/ch]
Everybody wants to get down like that[/tab]

[Chorus]
[tab]  [ch]C[/ch]                   [ch]G#[/ch]                         [ch]Bmaj7[/ch]
I wish I was a little bit taller, I wish I was a baller[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]G[/ch]
I wish I had a girl who looked good, I would[/tab]

call her, I wish I had a rabbit in a hat with a bat[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]G[/ch]
And a six-four Impala[/tab]

[tab]         [ch]G[/ch]
